input-field.name: captureUpdatePolicy
input-field.label: Capture update policy
Capture-Update-Richtlinie
input-field.helpText: What happens when an update changes the quantity or amount of a partial delivery whose payment was already captured. Capture itself is always idempotent (it never re-charges already-captured deliveries); this setting only governs editing an already-captured row.

option.name: Protect — reject financial changes to already-captured deliveries
Schützen — finanzielle Änderungen an bereits erfassten Lieferungen ablehnen
Flag — allow the change, mark it for reconciliation and dispatch an event (no automatic charge)
Markieren — Änderung zulassen, zur Abstimmung markieren und Event auslösen (keine automatische Belastung)
